name: 折叠刀（★） | 森林 DDPAT
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been painted using a Digital Disruptive Pattern (DDPAT) hydrographic. By the time you're close enough to notice the pixels it's already too late
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这把武器使用数字迷彩（DDPAT）图案的花纹进行了涂装。 当你能注意到像素图案的时候，已经为时已晚了
